title: ACSS Session
description: An active agent execution context with lifecycle tracking. Part of the Agent Credential Sandboxing Standard (ACSS) v1.0.

id.description: UUID v4 uniquely identifying this session.

agentId.description: Identifier of the agent running in this session.

profileName.description: Name of the permission profile applied to this session.

pid.description: Operating system process ID of the agent.

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the session was created.

active.description: Whether the session is currently running. Set to false on revocation or expiry.
